title: Better Vanilla Mobs
description: Get thousands of mob variations with random skills and stats, making combat unexpected.
body:
**Randomize skills and stats for mobs, keeping the vanilla touch. 1000+ variants, no resourcespack, discrete changes, balanced tweaks, scaled difficulty.** > Default Difficulty is set on EASY (because you're a weak human) > Use [Gorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gorify) for more bloody fight! ## Main features - Mobs get random skills and effects, making thousands of possibility. - 3 difficulty levels: easy to discover, medium to play, hard to challenge. Default: EASY. - Increased chances of getting more skills ands stats by increasing the datapack's difficulty in the options. - Compatibility with a [list of compatible mob datapacks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/collection/234963/better-vanilla-mobs-compatible/). - Hard difficulty can be really challenging (easy difficulty is vanilla like level). - Affinity system: mob can get a stat buff (+20% on damage, speed, knockback or max_health). 3% chance of being an ALPHA, getting every stat buffs. Or Weak, getting no buff. - Totem of Weakness: craft and lit the totem to secure an area. Monsters can't be enhanced in this area of protection. - Custom Names: mobs get a rarity and an affinity in their name. - 300+ of configurable parameters in the ingame options menu (patreon version). - WARNINGS: due to health modifications, most of AUTO FARMS are broken, or have to be reworked. Craft a "Totem of Weakness" and place it near your auto-farm to fix it. ## Totem of Weakness Craft and lit the Totem of Weakness to create a safe area. Mobs in this area cannot be enhanced, making them completly vanilla. Once they have been touched by the beacon, they can no longer be enhanced. Useful for mob farm and player bases. /!\ The totem won't despawn when active BUT mobs can steal it. So, protect it! ## Affected mob list
Cave Spider **Stats** - similar to vanilla - stick to ceilings (by renaming) - can be summoned by a Spider Mother (see Spider mob) **Skills** - Toxic: repeating bites give nausea (rng)
Creeper **Stats** - quicker - random Fuse time +/-20% - random Explosion Radius +/- 1 **Skills** - Bait: play a sound behind the player and rush at them (rng) - Baby: get a 1 block size (rng) - Unstable: explode on damage, whatever the distance (rng) - Powered: get powered by lightning (1-3%) (rng)
Drowned **Stats** - similar to vanilla **Skills** - HitSlow: slow players on hit (rng) - FireResistance: do not burn in daylight (rng)
Enderman **Stats** - similar to vanilla **Skills** - LookFreeze: lock players's movement on eyes battle (rng) - LookBreak: Destroy defensive roofs (only smooth block #mineable/shovel) (rng) - Vortex: may force players into the void, teleporting them nearby randomly (rng)
Evoker **Stats** - quicker, more tanky - invoked Vex will be upgraded by the pack (see Vex mob) **Skills** - Root: lock movements of nearby players (rng) - Group Heal: apply a Regeneration effect on nearby allies (rng)
Hoglin **Stats** - way more tanky, faster **Skills** - Hotblood: is immune to zombification (rng) - Stomp: push player in the ground (rng)
Husk **Stats** - way more tanky, slower **Skills** - Passive Regeneration (rng) - HitSlow: buff nearby husk whith speed on successful attack on a player (rng) - BreakTorch: can break torches (rng) - BreakFence: can break wooden fences/gates (rng) - BreakDoor: can break wooden doors (rng)
Illusioner **Stats** - similar to vanilla - may hide as a passive mob in Pillager Outpost, revealed on hit (10%) (rng) **Skills** - EnchantedBow: have a punch enchant (rng) - Heal: can heal himself with magic (rng)
Piglin **Stats** - a bit quicker - can be turned into a piglin brute (rng) **Skills** - Axe: use an axe instead of a crossbow (rng) - Tracker: chase you from far away (rng) - Trap: place a trap on the ground (rng)
Piglin Brute **Stats** - more tanky, more damage, quicker **Skills** - Armored: get heavy armor (rng) - Shield: get a shield and can pary most arrows (rng) - Rage: rush you on damage taken, after a quick moment of immobility (rng)
Pillager **Stats** - similar to vanilla **Skills** - FireRocket: sometimes fire with blue firework rockets (rng) - MultiShot: has a Multishot enchant (rng) - QuickCharge: has a Quick Charge enchant (rng) - IllegalCrossbow: get a renamed item if got the 2 enchants above.
Polar Bear **Stats** - more tanky, faster - more aggro range **Skills** - Angry: attack close player whatever a baby is present (rng)
Skeleton **Stats** - more damage, faster, low hp **Skills** - FireResist: don't burn in daylight (rng) - BreakTorch: break torches on walk (rng) - Sword: can switch from bow to sword when a player is close (rng) - Spear: fight with a spear (rng) - SmokeBomb: can use smoke bomb to escape or rush (over) (rng) - FireBomb: can use a fire bomb to escape or rush (nether) (rng) - Shield: can block most incomming arrows (rng)
Slime **Stats** - more tanky, a bit faster, knock back resistant **Skills** - Fusion: close slimes can merge together, increasing in size (rng) - Mega Jump: sometimes jump at players from far away (rng)
Spider **Stats** - faster - stick to ceilings **Skills** - CobwebThrow: try to catch player with cobwebs (rng) - StickyPath: let cobwebs in its path (auto removed when player leaves) (rng) - Cocoon: can protect itself in a cobweb cocoon (auto removed when player leaves) (rng) - Mother: can summon baby spiders, also get way bigger, slower, and very powerfull (rng)
Stray **Stats** - similar to vanilla **Skills** - BreakTorch: break torches on walk (rng) - FrozenThorns: freeze the attacker on damage taken (rng) - IcePrison: prison a player in an ice trap (auto removed when player leaves) (rng) - FrostWalker: freeze water at feet's level (rng)
Vex **Stats** - more damage (through weapons) **Skills** - ArrowDodge: can dodge most arrows (rng) (MOJANG BUG: dodging reduce their speed to 10%) - Shield: get a shield, increasing their armor (rng) - Axe: get an axe to inflict max damage (rng) - DualSword: get a cosmetic sword offhand (rng)
Vindicator **Stats** - faster, more tanky, more damage (extremly dangerous) - spawn in Pillager Outposts, replacing some Pillagers (30%) (rng) **Skills** - DualSword: get an offhand sword, increasing its attack speed and parry (rng) - Worker: use shovel and cobblestone as weapons to stun players on hit (rng) - Rage: on taking damage, sprint and deal a heavy blow, but get poison effect (rng)
Witch **Stats** - more tanky, heavy health regen **Skills** - Summons: summon foes to help in combat (foes are vanilla, not enhanced) (rng) - StasisSpell: when low HP, freeze its body in dark magic for fiew seconds, regenerating health and being invulnerable (rng) - PassiveRegen: get a passive health regen (canceled by the StasisSpell) (rng)
Wither Skeleton **Stats** - way more tanky (equipment), a bit faster - terrifying opponent **Skills** - LookBreak: can break protective roof at eye's level (rng) - Darkness: stop and spread darkness on the ground, regenerating on every target hit (rng) - FlyingBlades: summon 3 flying blades for 30s (rng) - GreatSword: get a powerful sword (rng) - Shield: block most arrows with a shield (rng) - Bow: get a bow instead of a sword (rng) - Thorns: get thorns enchant on heavy armor parts (rng)
Wolf **Stats** - a bit more tanky **Skills** - Angry: attack close ranged players (rng) - NightAttack: larger aggro range at night (rng)
Zombie / Zombie Villager **Stats** - way faster, more HP **Skills** - FireResist: don't burn in daylight (rng) - BreakTorches: can break torches (rng) - BreakDoor: can break wooden doors (rng) - BreakFence: can break fences and gates (rng) - Dig: can dig in soft materials, if a player is close (rng) - Builder: can use dirt to build tower, if a player is up close (rng)
Zombified Piglin **Stats** - faster **Skills** - Infected: leave a poisonned trail in its steps (rng) - Explosive: head turns into a shroom lamp and explode on player close range (rng) - Infected + Explosive = toxic explosion - Angry: aggro the player on close range (1-3%) (rng)
## How to...
Change mobs difficulty Difficulty is automaticly set to EASY. Unless you want to change that. - Check the ingame menu with ```/function fkbm:options/get﻿``` - Then found the BaseDifficulty option (first line) - click on the [edit] button and change the number as you wish From Diff 1, up to 3. 4 is "auto", copying the world's diff. Pro tip: hover the option with your mouse to get description infos. ```/scoreboard players set BaseDifficulty fkbm.options 4```
Inscrease ALPHA spawn chance (patreon version required) Default spawn chance is 3%. Alpha does not increase skill chances (BaseDifficulty does, see above), just statistics. - Check the ingame menu with ```/function fkbm:options/get``` - Click on the [​Affinity menu] buttonhen - Click on the second Affinity.Alpha.Chance [​edit] button, and change the 3 for a [​0 to 100]. ```/scoreboard players set Affinity.Alpha.Chance fkbm.options 3```
Disable MobGriefing of the pack Some skills might use mob griefing, putting cobwebs or breaking dirt... Most of it is removed, automaticaly replaced by air when players go away. But if you want absolutly prevent this, use this option. It will disable all griefing related skills. - Check the ingame menu with ```/function fkbm:options/get``` - Find the MobGriefing option (third line) - Click on the [​edit] button and change the 3 for a [0 to 3] 0: disabled. 1: soft (only auto removed ones). 2: full (no restriction). 3: auto (copy gamerule, set to 1 or 2) ```/scoreboard players set MobGriefing.Enable fkbm.options 0```
Enable Nightmare levels - Check the ingame menu with ```/function fkbm:options/get``` - Click on the [​Nightmare menu] button - Click on the first NightmareBaseLvl [​edit] button, and change the 0 for a [​0 to 100] Each level of nightmare increases: health +5%, damage +2%, speed +0.2%. ```/scoreboard players set NightmareBaseLvl fkbm.options 10``` Or enable progressive nightmare levels (default: from 0 to 100, increase 1% per minute, +1% per kill, /2 on death). ```/scoreboard players set NightmareAutoLvlUp fkbm.options 1```﻿
Hide / disable all mob's custom names - Check the ingame menu with ```/function fkbm:options/get﻿``` - Click on the [Cname menu] button - Click on the first Cname [edit] button, and change the 1 for a 0 ```/scoreboard players set Cname fkbm.options 0```
## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkbm:options/get```

**Creeper & Spider v2 (2023-03-01):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Deadlot3 - **Vex, Hoglin & nether Skeleton (2023-02-14):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Deadlot3, Samantha Flanary - **Pillager, Vindicator, Evoker & Illusioner (2022-11-12):** Jonathan Fanelli, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert, ooF, Tân Huỳnh, ZMH, Deadlot3, Samantha Flanary, Andrew T Harris - **Witch, Enderman, Stray & compatibility (2022-08-14):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert, ooF, Tân Huỳnh - **V1 (2022-08-05):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert, ooF, Tân Huỳnh
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Compatibility - Advanced Mobs (MEDIUM) - Beasts and Monsters (HIGH) - Better Nether Mobs (HIGH) - dungeons_and_taverns (MEDIUM) - Dungeon Now Loading (HIGH) - Infinity Cave (HIGH) - mo_variants (HIGH) - Mob Captains (HIGH) - Mob Variants (HIGH) - Rpg Loot (BROKEN) - Special Mobs (MEDIUM) - True Survival (HIGH) - Upgraded Mobs (MEDIUM) - Vanilla Mob Bosses/Variants (MEDIUM) - WASD Moar Bosses (HIGH) - WASD Random Bosses (HIGH) **Developers infos** All the handled mobs are tagged with fkbm.touched . To make my pack ignore a mob, add this tag on it: **fkbm.ignore** , or add the conventionnal **global.ignore**, **smithed.entity** or **smithed.strict** . To disable custom name for a mob, add **fkbm.no_customname** tag to the entity.
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
Issue / Bug - Entities Lock in place: some entities (skeletons, wither skeletons) might have trouble with path finding when using a weapon they're not supposed to use. It happens on Fabric, and other technologies that modifies entity's data, making vanilla command uneffective.
Visitors
